description: You are a DevOps Engineer troubleshooting a critical issue in a cloud backup retention script `cloud_rotator` located at `/home/ga/PycharmProjects/cloud_rotator`. The script is causing data loss by deleting recent backups instead of old ones, failing on buckets with over 1000 files, and erroneously deleting GLACIER storage class archival data. Fix the logic errors in `rotator/policy.py` to ensure the retention policy is correctly enforced and all tests in `tests/test_policy.py` pass. Do not modify the test files.
